implemented_this_release: Added 17 exercise-specific Form Guides with setup, movement, common mistakes, tips, targets, equipment, and level
Added licensed or public-domain photographs with visible source, creator, and license attribution
Preserved the existing bottom-sheet workflow and v0.28.0 backend storage paths
Added explicit offline/photo-load fallback and a truthful unmatched-exercise fallback
inherited_verified_evidence: v0.25.2 direct mobile workout save handler and visible failure path
Deterministic medication, sleep, workbook, provenance, and workflow regressions
known_issues: Built-in injury-aware programs are conservative examples, not diagnosis, physical therapy, medical clearance, or individualized rehabilitation prescriptions
Program selection and creation use simple alpha dialogs and should be replaced by a polished dedicated Program Library / Builder screen
Physical-device, live Google Drive, protected workbook, service-worker, and accessibility behavior require environment verification
Form Guide photographs are loaded from Wikimedia Commons and require network access; written guidance remains available if an image cannot load
Built-in injury-aware programs are educational planning examples, not diagnosis, physical therapy, medical clearance, or individualized rehabilitation prescriptions
next_review_items: Deployed physical-device Save Workout, sleep selector, and modal-entry acceptance
Live Drive profile/goal/sleep persistence and Calendar/AI verification
required_regression_checks: rendered workflow smoke test where supported
real-data workbook regression when fixture is available
final ZIP reopened and byte-compared with staging
current_focus: Validate the completed Form Guide and Workout Program workflows on deployed mobile and desktop environments
